title: Sinnsally Manual Food Chopper Pull String,Hand Food Shredder,Onions Slicer Cutter Dicer,Garlic Slap Press,Manual Processor Vegetable Blender Chopping Onions (520ml)
features: 【Safe Material】Made of food-grade PP plastic, BPA free, this manual mini chopper comes with sharp 420 stainless steel blade.Won’t blunt, bent and rust.

【Very Effective】The mini food processors works without electricity. Chop almost all types of food quickly and effortlessly- the more often you pull the string, the finer the result! The manual garlic chopper is perfect for home kitchen, travel and camping. You can also used as a gift to your loved ones.

【Multi-Function Food Chopper】With the pull food chopper dicer you can process any vegetables and food.The onion chopper dicer is perfect for chopping onion, vegetables, fruits, carrot, nuts, ginger, meat etc.

【Durable Manual Garlic Chopper】The stable, non-slip base of the premium hand chopper prevents the chopper from slipping off the counter and the transparent bowl makes it easy to see the degree of chopping. Additional blender can mixe/blend the ingredients effectively.

【Easy to Clean & Storage】Detachable blade, cover and bottom body make to easy clean and Storage. This vegetable chopper is perfect kitchen gadget. We believe in our vegetable cutter so much that if for any reason you are not fully satisfied, please feels free to contact us 24-hours customer support. We want to provide you with a pleasant shopping experience.
description: Product Description It's really a multifunctional kitchen tool: You can get what you want in seconds. You don't need any chopping skills. Running without electrical, you can use it anywhere, anytime. You can chopping the ingredients very finely by manual onion chopper. You don't need to touch the blades with your hands when operation, it's very safe. There is no great noise when using.You can prepare breakfast quietly without worrying about waking up the kids. This vegetable cutter is unexceptionable.It is not only exquisite, but also light in weight, easy to store, and does not take up too much space. Suitable capacity can meet most families needs. It is perfect for kitchen, RVs, Camping, trips and so on. Notes to be attention: Please cut the vegetables into large pieces before chopping. If you chopping meat, make sure it boneless and without skin. Please don’t pull the string drastically as the string will not naturally draw back. Please clean the garlic grinder after using it. Don’t let the blade deep into the water for a long time. Please keep it dry after you clean . Pay attention to the blades, as they are very sharp. Please keep it away from children. Please keep the manual food processor away from high temperature, and don’t boiling it. And it also don’t apply to microwave and ovens. Please do not soak the lid so that water can get in easily. If the water gets into the lid, pull the string hole down and pull the rope down to get the water out.
